eiri.line: He spent the whole breakfast explaining why he doesn't tip. That's the opening statement.
Slow walk. Little Green Bag. Tarantino knew this would be remembered.
Mr. Orange is lying in the blood. He stays there for the whole film.
Stuck in the Middle with You became a different song after this.
Everyone is using a fake name. Everyone knows who everyone else is.
When he talks about the Madonna song, he's already talking about this film.
Three guns pointing in three directions. Nobody can win.
The ending happens in the corridor. Not in the warehouse.
